raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase of curtains on my Home Depot credit card. The company, which has never done this before, ran XXXX ( XXXX ) pending charges of {$1.00} each on the card. The next day the entire charge was processed in the amount of {$160.00}. Home Depot has refused to remove the pending charges associates with this purchase of {$160.00} even though the charge has been processed and charged to my account.
